LAW AND MOTION 302,DEFENDANT GENERAL MOTORS, LLC'S AMENDED DEMURRER TO FIRST AMENDED COMPLAINT AS TO THE SEVENTH CAUSE OF ACTION IS OVERRULED. FRAUD IS PLED WITH SUFFICIENT PARTICULARITY; PLAINTIFF RAISES MULTIPLE REASONS WHY THE STATUTE OF LIMITATIONS CANNOT BAR THE CLAIM AT THE PLEADING STAGE; THE COMPLAINT SUFFICIENTLY NEGATES THE ECONOMIC LOSS RULE. PREVAILING PARTY TO PREPARE A FORM OF ORDER AND TO COMPLY WITH CRC 3.1312. JUDGE: RICHARD ULMER; CLERK: CYNTHIA HERBERT; REPORTER: CAROL KAREN, CSR #8189 =302/RU

AMENDED DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Jun-16-2017 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

APPEARANCES - ATTY. CHRISTINE LEE OF THE STRATEGIC LEGAL PRACTICES, TEL. NO. 1-310-329-4917 APPEARING FOR THE PLAINTIFF;
ATTY. MICAH YOSPE OF GORDON & REES LLP APPEARING FOR THE DEFENDANT GENERAL MOTORS LLC.

RULING - A R G U E D; The Court adopted its tentative ruling. DEFENDANT GENERAL MOTORS, LLC'S AMENDED DEMURRER TO FIRST AMENDED COMPLAINT as to the seventh cause of action is
OVERRULED. Fraud is pled with sufficient particularity; plaintiff raises multiple reasons why the statute of limitations cannot bar the claim at the pleading stage; the complaint sufficiently negates the economic loss rule. Prevailing party to prepare a form of order and to comply with CRC 3.1312. Judge: Richard Ulmer; Clerk: Cynthia Herbert; Reporter: Carol Karen, CSR #8189 =302/ru

AMENDED MOTION TO STRIKE 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Jun-16-2017 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES - ATTY. CHRISTINE LEE OF THE STRATEGIC LEGAL PRACTICES, TEL. NO. 1-310-329-4917 APPEARING FOR THE PLAINTIFF;
ATTY. MICAH YOSPE OF GORDON & REES LLP APPEARING FOR THE DEFENDANT GENEAL MOTORS LLC.

RULING - The Court adopted its tentative ruling. DEFENDANT GENERAL MOTORS, LLC'S AMENDED MOTION TO STRIKE FIRST AMENDED COMPLAINT is DENIED; this follows from denial of the demurrers. Prevailing party to prepare a form of order and to comply with CRC 3.1312. Judge: Richard Ulmer; Clerk: Cynthia Herbert; Reporter: Carol Karen, CSR #8189 =302/ru
